message:
chore: audit batch 494 — gen_server, actor, IO buffers, pool, rwlock

All SOUND. Reply drop-bomb is intentional enforcement. Actor cast
TOCTOU is inherent to actor model. IO buffer invariants maintained.
Pool double-checkout prevented. RwLock writer-preference correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
